body:
If you are currently stuck with a heavy, unmovable door or a snapped cable due to a broken spring, several highly rated, local companies service the **Pleasanton and Tri-Valley area** and specialize in **same-day garage door spring replacement**. [Broken Spring Repair Pleasanton | Valiant Garage Door](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-spring-replacement#:~:text=Same%2DDay%20Garage%20Door%20Spring,Service%20Areas)

Because garage door springs are under high tension and present a major safety hazard, it is highly recommended to let a professional with a fully stocked truck handle the swap safely.

Here are the top local options to call right now for same-day service:

### 1\. Precision Garage Door of East Bay

  * **Location:** 405 Boulder Court, Ste 800, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=Garage%20Maintenance,Garage%20Door%20Repair%20Specialists)

  * **Phone:** (925) 268-9267 [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=at%20any%20time.-,Precision%20Garage%20Door%20Service,Need%20service%20today%3F)

  * **Why them:** They are physically located right in Pleasanton, meaning their technicians are usually close by. They offer 24/7 phone support with live operators, schedule appointments from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM (including weekends at no extra charge), and carry a full inventory of torsion and extension springs on their trucks to finish the job in a single visit. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Same%2Dday%20service%20is%20available,\(925\)%20268%2D9267%20.)

### 2\. Valiant Garage Door

  * **Location:** Pimlico Dr, Pleasanton, CA 94588 [Broken Spring Repair Pleasanton | Valiant Garage Door](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-spring-replacement#:~:text=Need%20Help%20Right%20Now%3F,3588%20Pimlico%20Dr)

  * **Phone:** (925) 409-4974 [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Free%20Estimate%20Instantly-,Gallery%20Moenave,4974%20Book%20Free%20Estimate%20Instantly)

  * **Why them:** A highly rated, founder-led local business run by Valentino Ramirez. They emphasize transparent upfront pricing, keep common residential spring sizes fully stocked for same-day replacements, and provide thorough balance and safety testing before leaving. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Valiant%20gives%20one%20complete%20garage,need%20reliable%20garage%20door%20help.)[Broken Spring Repair Pleasanton | Valiant Garage Door](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-spring-replacement#:~:text=Valiant%20Garage%20Door%20provides%20garage,balance%20and%20opener%20force%20checks.)

### 3\. The Door Doctor

  * **Location:** 39 California Ave., #102, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [The Door Doctor: HOME](https://www.thedoordoctors.com/)

  * **Why them:** A long-standing local staple with a physical showroom right on California Ave. They handle emergency spring replacements and offer fast, local same-day repair windows depending on their daily route availability. [The Door Doctor: HOME](https://www.thedoordoctors.com/)[Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Who%20Does%20Same%2DDay%20Garage,Pleasanton%20garage%20door%20repair%20page.)

### 4\. Right Way Garage Doors

  * **Service Area:** Full coverage across Pleasanton and the Tri-Valley [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/)

  * **Why them:** Their "Service Pro" vans operate as mobile repair shops stocked specifically with high-cycle replacement springs to ensure they can get a broken door operational on the spot without needing to order parts.

### 💡 Pro-Tips Before You Call:

  * **Don't try to open the door with the automatic opener:** Trying to force a door open with a broken spring can burn out your garage door opener’s motor or strip the gears.

  * **Replace both springs:** If your door uses a dual-torsion spring system and only one broke, ask the technician to replace both. The unbroken spring has experienced the exact same amount of wear and tear and will usually snap shortly after the first one is replaced.

  * **Ask about the warranty:** High-quality garage door springs are rated by "cycles" (how many times the door opens and closes). Ask if they offer high-cycle springs and what kind of parts/labor warranty they include.
